category_sources: Official GitHub README describes Clipper as a service exposing the local clipboard to tmux sessions and other processes.
source_facts.description says it shares the macOS clipboard with tmux and other apps.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README and repository title use Clipper.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains Overview, setup, configuration, FAQ, and history sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/wincent/clipper, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README describes local and remote tmux clipboard workflows and daemon behavior.
source_facts.description mentions macOS clipboard and tmux.
